description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a robust, angular body with a prominent front-mounted cannon and a spiked battering ram, suggesting offensive capabilities. The vehicle is equipped with six large, rugged tires, each with deep treads for enhanced traction on rough terrain. Its upper body is armored with yellow and black hazard-striped panels, and the sides display vented orange plating for engine cooling. The rear includes additional storage or fuel canisters, and a small antenna is mounted on the roof, likely for communication. The color scheme is a mix of industrial yellow, orange, blue-gray, and black, with no visible camouflage or military insignia. The overall design emphasizes durability, firepower, and urban tactical utility.
description: A heavily armored, six-wheeled combat vehicle with a large front cannon, spiked ram, and hazard-striped panels, designed for urban tactical operations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large cannon, spiked battering ram, and hazard-striped armor panels flanking the vehicle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the three large tires, vented orange side armor, and the full length of the cannon.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the storage or fuel canisters, rear armor plating, and the back ends of the hazard-striped panels.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the three right tires, side-mounted canister, and the spiked ram from a different angle.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted at the front center, integrated into the main body; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor panels; front features reinforced, sloped plating and a spiked ram; sides and rear have modular, vented, and hazard-striped panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: No camouflage pattern; solid colors with hazard stripes.
attribute_tire_type: Six large off-road tires with deep tread patterns, designed for rugged terrain; no visible reinforcement or chains.
